title: scutellaria axilliflora var. axilliflora
intro: Scutellaria axilliflora var. axilliflora, also known as Chinese skullcap, is a plant species belonging to the mint family and is native to China and other parts of Asia. Chinese skullcap is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Chinese skullcap include its ability to alleviate anxiety, insomnia, and other nervous system disorders, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Chinese skullcap is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote relaxation and balance.
